Flower.title: Flower
Flower.description: A flower planted in the garden by a user representing a memory or dedication.

planterName.description: The name of the person who planted the flower.

message.description: A hidden memory, dedication, or wish.

color.description: The hex color of the flower.

careCount.description: How many times this flower has been watered or pollinated.

rarity.description: The rarity of the flower, unlocked via points or games.

flowers.description: A collection of all flowers in the garden.
